body: Worked example (ac-05): in this session I suggested 'file a card for orbit spec promote in rust' as a follow-up to porting promote.sh. Hugh corrected — that's a choice (an architectural decision about implementation surface — bash vs rust verb vs MCP-native), not a card (a new capability). The capability 'promote a card to a spec' already exists; only the implementation surface is changing. This is the load-bearing illustration the discrimination is guarding against.
